Name: I'm Rhythem Jain
Description: Mechatronics Engineering student at JEC, Jabalpur. Building AI-powered platforms and open-source contributor. Turning real-world problems into intelligent solutions.

AboutPara1: I'm Rhythem Jain, a Mechatronics Engineering student at Jabalpur Engineering College with a CGPA of 8.167/10. I build AI-powered platforms that solve real problems — from credit underwriting to threat intelligence and equity analytics.
AboutPara2: I've competed in national-level hackathons at IIT Hyderabad and UIDAI Data Hackathon 2026, built and deployed production-grade APIs on Azure and cloud platforms, and earned certifications from Anthropic, Google, and Columbia University. I thrive at the intersection of AI, data, and web engineering.

title: Intelli-Credit
para: AI B2B Credit Underwriting Platform — end-to-end MSME credit gap solution with 5C scoring, Gemini RAG chatbot, and AI-generated PDF CAM reports. Built for IIT Hyderabad Hackathon.

title: Honeypot API
para: Threat Intelligence Platform capturing and analysing malicious traffic. Deployed on Microsoft Azure with CI/CD pipelines. Built for HCL GUVI India AI Buildathon (40,000+ participants).

title: AadhaarIQ
para: Aadhaar Equity Intelligence Platform — first-of-its-kind Aadhaar Equity Index across 36 states & 984 districts, analysing 4.93M records with Gemini chatbot dashboard.

title: FinTrace
para: Layered AML Detection System — 5 detection algorithms (IQR, 99th-percentile, multi-identity, NetworkX circular transactions, rapid-movement), interactive spider-map visualisation, deployed on Render.

I'm always open to exploring new opportunities, collaborations, or just exchanging ideas with like-minded builders. Feel free to reach out if you'd like to connect, discuss a project, or talk AI and tech!
